title: palicourea moensis
intro: Palicourea moensis, also known as the "Amazonian blue sage," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antipyretic and anti-inflammatory agent, due to the presence of compounds like palicourea alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Palicourea moensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Palicourea moensis is typically prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures and infusions for medicinal purposes.
